nodes.label: mcc
nodes.definition: Matthews correlation coefficient: (TP·TN − FP·FN) / sqrt((TP+FP)(TP+FN)(TN+FP)(TN+FN)); generalised via the R_k confusion-matrix form. Range [-1, 1].

nodes.label: cohen_kappa
nodes.definition: Cohen's kappa: (p_o − p_e) / (1 − p_e), agreement corrected for chance, where p_o is observed agreement and p_e the expected-by-chance agreement.

nodes.label: spearman
nodes.definition: Spearman rank correlation: Pearson correlation of the rank variables (average ranks for ties).
